channel.title: Posts on Lamine Abdellaoui
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Lamine Abdellaoui

item.title: ++i or i++
item.description: Seldom is our code free of control flow statements, especially iterators. In this post, I will discuss the differences between the use of i++ and ++i.

item.title: My First Post
item.description: my first post on my blog to say that I will be writing about tech and everything related.
